space.$description: 8pt spacing scale (DESIGN.md §4) — rem so the whole scale honors root font-size. Names mirror the --s1..--s7 CSS vars on the design page.

radius.$description: Radius scale (DESIGN.md §6): one consistent set; nested radii relate inner = outer − padding. xs 2 · sm 8 · md(default) 12 · lg 16 · pill 999.
